name: Platformer Carry (moving-platform ride proof)
description: Reuse proof for the 0.10.0 resolver carry mode (ride-platform, INDIE-ROADMAP two-body carry half): a player rides a horizontally-tweened solid platform and can walk while carried; a passenger follows a vertically-descending platform down. Built from move-platformer + velocity + solid-collide + ride-platform with no host code.
